Playback Singer · Live Performer · Record Holder
Bharath Mallad
Founder & Lead Vocalist, Swarabharatha

Born in Shimoga, Karnataka, Bharath Mallad is a versatile playback singer in the Kannada and Telugu film industries, a live performer, and the creative force behind Swarabharatha.

His voice has graced over 21 films, including the Pan-India blockbuster Kantara Chapter 1, where he sang the sacred Bhairava Mantra and Ganesha Shloka in the iconic Brahmakalasha song. Whether in a recording studio or on a 5,000-capacity concert stage, Bharath's voice carries a rare combination of raw emotion, technical brilliance, and spiritual depth that leaves audiences mesmerised.

📸 Follow @beingbharath on Instagram
